positive: A majestic watercolor style illustration of a stylized golden retriever sitting confidently in a sunlit, abstract meadow. The dog has a clean, elegant silhouette against a contrasting background of deep sapphire blue and soft sage green. The art style should evoke a sophisticated, minimalist botanical sketch mixed with modern watercolor fluidity. Focus on strong, clean lines for the dog's outline, and use dappled light effects and soft gradients for the meadow texture. Composition should be centered, perfect for a t-shirt graphic. High detail, commercial art, vibrant color palette, artboard illustration, perfect for screen printing.
